name: SOC Sentinel One
description: Enhancements for SentinelOne Singularity telemetry used by the SOC Framework on Cortex XSIAM. Reshapes events from `sentinelone_v2_generic_alert_raw` into properly-shaped XSIAM alerts with DS:sentinelone/SentinelOne Singularity tags so Foundation Product Classification routes them into the Endpoint category.
author: Palo Alto Networks
